description: The Kelly Park Compton Crips are a set of the Crips gang alliance originating in Kelly Park, Compton, California. Known for its connection with rap group N.W.A, members include Eazy-E and MC Ren. The gang has been involved in violent conflicts with rival Piru sets, including the Lueders Park Piru. A police substation established in 1986 reduced criminal incidents in the area.
